---
title: "紅酒"
author: "TPicture"
date: "2025-05-31"
output:
  word_document: default
  html_document: default
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
Redwine_data = read.csv("C:\\Users\\E2546\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\課業\\大一下\\統計思維與分析\\RedWineQuality\\winequality-red.csv")
Redwine_data
```

```{r}
options(repos = c(CRAN = "https://cloud.r-project.org"))
install.packages("ggplot2")
install.packages("reshape2")
```
```{r}
# 安裝並載入必要套件
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)

# 轉換 quality 為 factor
wine_data$quality <- as.factor(wine_data$quality)

# 長格式轉換
wine_long <- wine_data %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -quality,
    names_to = "variable",
    values_to = "value"
  )

# 畫大圖（可調整高度和寬度）
plot <- ggplot(wine_long, aes(x = value, fill = quality)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.6) +
  facet_wrap(~ variable, scales = "free", ncol = 3) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  labs(title = "Stacked Density Plots of Features by Quality",
       x = "Value", y = "Density")

# 儲存圖檔為高解析圖片
ggsave("stacked_density_plot.png", plot, width = 16, height = 10, dpi = 300)



```


```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(reshape2)

# 計算整體相關係數矩陣
cor_matrix <- cor(Redwine_data, use = "complete.obs")

# 擷取 quality 那一列
quality_cor <- cor_matrix[, "quality", drop = FALSE]

# melt 成適合 ggplot 的格式
cor_df <- melt(quality_cor, varnames = "Feature", value.name = "Correlation")

# 畫 heatmap 並在每格上標出數值
ggplot(cor_df, aes(x = Feature, y = 1, fill = Correlation)) +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(Correlation, 2)), color = "black", size = 5) +  # 加上文字標示
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "blue", high = "red", mid = "white",
                       midpoint = 0, limit = c(-1,1), space = "Lab",
                       name = "相關係數") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_blank(),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  ggtitle("每個特徵與 wine quality 的相關係數熱力圖")


```

```{r}
quality_cor <- cor(Redwine_data)[, "quality"]
quality_cor
```
# 分群囉
```{r}
library(MASS)

stability_selection <- function(data, B = 100, sample_ratio = 0.7) {
  predictors <- setdiff(colnames(data), c("quality"))
  formula <- as.formula(paste("quality ~ (", paste(predictors, collapse = " + "), ")^2"))
  
  var_counts <- list()
  
  for (i in 1:B) {
    sample_index <- sample(1:nrow(data), size = floor(nrow(data) * sample_ratio), replace = FALSE)
    sample_data <- data[sample_index, ]
    
    fit <- tryCatch({
      lm(formula, data = sample_data)
    }, error = function(e) NULL)
    
    if (!is.null(fit)) {
      step_model <- tryCatch({
        stepAIC(fit, direction = "back", trace = FALSE)
      }, error = function(e) NULL)
      
      if (!is.null(step_model)) {
        vars <- names(coef(step_model))[-1]  # remove intercept
        for (v in vars) {
          if (is.null(var_counts[[v]])) {
            var_counts[[v]] <- 1L
          } else {
            var_counts[[v]] <- var_counts[[v]] + 1L
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }
  
  return(sort(unlist(var_counts), decreasing = TRUE))
}

wine_stability <- stability_selection(Redwine_data, B = 100)
cat("重要特徵出現次數：\n")
print(wine_stability)
```
### 無聊喜資料
```{r}
Redwine_data_clean <- Redwine_data

features <- setdiff(names(Redwine_data), "quality")

for (feature in features) {
  col_mean <- mean(Redwine_data_clean[[feature]], na.rm = TRUE)
  col_sd <- sd(Redwine_data_clean[[feature]], na.rm = TRUE)
  lower <- col_mean - 2 * col_sd
  upper <- col_mean + 2 * col_sd
  
  # 只保留落在區間內的列
  Redwine_data_clean <- Redwine_data_clean[
    Redwine_data_clean[[feature]] >= lower & Redwine_data_clean[[feature]] <= upper, 
  ]
}

```


### 最佳解
```{r}
rmse_array = numeric(1000)
accuracy_array <- numeric(1000)
n <- nrow(Redwine_data)
for(i in 1:3000){
  train_index <- sample(1:n, size = floor(0.98 * n))
  train_data <- Redwine_data[train_index, ]
  test_data <- Redwine_data[-train_index, ]
  formula_text <- paste("quality ~", paste(names(wine_stability[wine_stability > 67]), collapse = " + "))
  formula <- as.formula(formula_text)
  ft_model = lm(formula, data = train_data)

  pred <- predict(ft_model, newdata = test_data)
  rmse <- sqrt(mean((test_data$quality - pred)^2, na.rm = TRUE))
  rmse_array[i] = rmse
  
  rounded_pred <- round(pred - 0)
  correct_count <- sum(rounded_pred == test_data$quality, na.rm = TRUE)
  accuracy <- correct_count / length(rounded_pred)
  accuracy_array[i] <- accuracy
}
cat("Median RMSE 為：", round(median(rmse_array), 3), "\n")
cat("Mean RMSE 為：", round(mean(rmse_array), 3), "\n")
cat("平均準確度為：", round(mean(accuracy_array) * 100, 2), "%\n")
```


### 洗資料的最佳解
```{r}
rmse_array = numeric(3000)
accuracy_array <- numeric(3000)
classification_accuracy_array<- logical(3000)
n <- nrow(Redwine_data_clean)
for(i in 1:3000){
  train_index <- sample(1:n, size = floor(0.98 * n))
  train_data <- Redwine_data_clean[train_index, ]
  test_data <- Redwine_data_clean[-train_index, ]
  formula_text <- paste("quality ~", paste(names(wine_stability[wine_stability > 67]), collapse = " + "))
  formula <- as.formula(formula_text)
  ft_model = lm(formula, data = train_data)

  pred <- predict(ft_model, newdata = test_data)
  rmse <- sqrt(mean((test_data$quality - pred)^2, na.rm = TRUE))
  rmse_array[i] = rmse

  correct_count <- sum(round(pred - 0.2) == test_data$quality | round(pred + 0.2) == test_data$quality, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  # 計算分類正確率（%）
  pred_class <- ifelse(pred > 0.65, "high", "low")
  true_class <- ifelse(test_data$quality > 0.65, "high", "low")
  correct_flags <- pred_class == true_class
  classification_accuracy_array[i] <- mean(correct_flags, na.rm = TRUE)

  accuracy <- correct_count / length(rounded_pred)
  accuracy_array[i] <- accuracy
}
cat("Median RMSE 為：", round(median(rmse_array), 3), "\n")
cat("Mean RMSE 為：", round(mean(rmse_array), 3), "\n")
cat("平均準確度為：", round(mean(accuracy_array) * 100, 2), "%\n")
cat("平均分類正確率為：", round(mean(classification_accuracy_array) * 100, 2), "%\n")
```
### 不要理這個
```{r}
if(FALSE){
  rmse_array = numeric(1000)
  accuracy_array <- numeric(1000)
  
  for(i in 1:1000){
    train_index <- sample(1:n, size = floor(0.95 * n))
    train_data <- Redwine_data[train_index, ]
    test_data <- Redwine_data[-train_index, ]
    ft_model = lm(formula = quality ~ fixed.acidity + sqrt(fixed.acidity) + 
        volatile.acidity + I(volatile.acidity^2) + log(volatile.acidity) + 
        sqrt(volatile.acidity) + citric.acid + log(chlorides) + 
        I(free.sulfur.dioxide^2) + sqrt(free.sulfur.dioxide) + total.sulfur.dioxide + 
        density + log(density) + pH + sulphates + I(sulphates^2) + 
        sqrt(sulphates) + alcohol + I(alcohol^2) + log(alcohol) + 
        sqrt(alcohol) + residual.sugar + 
        sqrt(residual.sugar), data = train_data)
  
    pred <- predict(ft_model, newdata = test_data)
    rmse <- sqrt(mean((test_data$quality - pred)^2, na.rm = TRUE))
    rmse_array[i] = rmse
    
    rounded_pred <- round(pred - 0.15)
    correct_count <- sum(rounded_pred == test_data$quality, na.rm = TRUE)
    accuracy <- correct_count / length(rounded_pred)
    accuracy_array[i] <- accuracy
  }
  cat("Median RMSE 為：", round(median(rmse_array), 3), "\n")
  cat("Mean RMSE 為：", round(mean(rmse_array), 3), "\n")
  cat("平均準確度為：", round(mean(accuracy_array) * 100, 2), "%\n")
}

```

#### 統計檢定
```{r}
plot(ft_model)
summary(ft_model)
anova(ft_model)
```



### 不要理這個
```{r}
if(FALSE){
  n <- nrow(Redwine_data)
  all_vars <- names(wine_stability)
  
  make_terms <- function(data, var_list) {
    terms <- c()
    for (v in var_list) {
      if (v %in% names(data)) {
        terms <- c(terms, v)
        terms <- c(terms, paste0("I(", v, "^2)"))
        if (all(data[[v]] > 0, na.rm = TRUE)) {
          terms <- c(terms, paste0("log(", v, ")"), paste0("sqrt(", v, ")"))
        }
      }
    }
    return(terms)
  }
  
  results <- data.frame(n_vars = 5:length(all_vars), mean_rmse = NA)
  
  for (k in 5:length(all_vars)) {
    current_vars <- all_vars[1:k]
    rmse_array <- numeric(5)
  
    for (i in 1:5) {
      train_index <- sample(1:n, size = floor(0.95 * n))
      train_data <- Redwine_data[train_index, ]
      test_data <- Redwine_data[-train_index, ]
  
      terms <- make_terms(train_data, current_vars)
      formula_text <- paste("quality ~", paste(terms, collapse = " + "))
      formula <- as.formula(formula_text)
  
      ft_model_trans <- lm(formula, data = train_data)
      step_model <- stepAIC(ft_model_trans, direction = "both", trace = FALSE)
  
      pred <- predict(step_model, newdata = test_data)
      rmse_array[i] <- sqrt(mean((test_data$quality - pred)^2, na.rm = TRUE))
    }
  
    results$mean_rmse[k - 4] <- mean(rmse_array, na.rm = TRUE)
  }
  
  # 找出最好的 n_vars
  best <- results[which.min(results$mean_rmse), ]
  cat("✅ 最佳變數數量為：", best$n_vars, "，對應的 mean RMSE 為：", round(best$mean_rmse, 3), "\n")
  
  # 畫圖
  library(ggplot2)
  ggplot(results, aes(x = n_vars, y = mean_rmse)) +
    geom_line() +
    geom_point() +
    ggtitle("使用前 n 個最佳變數（含轉換 + stepAIC）時的平均 RMSE") +
    xlab("使用變數數量 (前 n 個)") +
    ylab("Mean RMSE")
  plot(step_model)
  summary(step_model)
  anova(step_model)
}
```
